name: ZscalerZIA_AddToSecurityExceptions
author: Fabien Bloume, StrangeBee
description: Add URLs (domain, fqdn, url) to Zscaler Internet Access Security Exceptions - Do Not Scan Content from these URLs (Policy > Security > Advanced Threat Protection > Security Exceptions)

configurationItems.name: auth_type
configurationItems.description: Authentication type: 'oneapi' for ZIdentity OAuth2 (default) or 'legacy' for legacy API credentials

configurationItems.name: zia_vanity_domain
configurationItems.description: [OneAPI only] Zscaler ZIdentity vanity domain for your organization (e.g., 'acme' from acme.zslogin.net)

configurationItems.name: zia_client_id
configurationItems.description: [OneAPI only] Zscaler OneAPI OAuth Client ID created in ZIdentity Admin Portal

configurationItems.name: zia_client_secret
configurationItems.description: [OneAPI only] Zscaler OneAPI OAuth Client Secret from ZIdentity Admin Portal

configurationItems.name: zia_username
configurationItems.description: [Legacy only] ZIA API admin email address

configurationItems.name: zia_api_key
configurationItems.description: [Legacy only] ZIA API key (obfuscated API key)

configurationItems.name: zia_cloud
configurationItems.description: Cloud environment name. Required for legacy auth (e.g., 'zscaler', 'zscalerone', 'zscalertwo'). Optional for OneAPI (use for beta/alpha environments).

configurationItems.name: dry_run
configurationItems.description: Dry run mode: if true, validation runs but no changes are made to ZIA

configurationItems.name: activate_changes
configurationItems.description: Activate changes after modifying ZIA configuration (recommended). If false, changes remain pending until manual activation or logout.

configurationItems.name: allow_risky_iocs
configurationItems.description: Allow adding risky IOCs like bare TLDs (e.g., 'com') to allowlist

configurationItems.name: http_proxy_hostname
configurationItems.description: HTTP proxy hostname if Cortex requires one to reach the Zscaler API (e.g., 'proxy.internal')
